Overview

Dark. Terminal. Addictive.

An idle clicker built entirely in a glowing green terminal aesthetic. Click the bug, buy buildings, watch your bugs/sec grow from 0.1 to 2.5 trillion.

LIVE GAMEPLAY
Features

Everything a Bug Factory Needs.

🏗
30 Buildings
From a humble Rubber Duck to God Mode itself. Each with unique flavour text and pixel art icons. The tech stack grows more absurd with every purchase.
79+ UPGRADES
⚔
Heroes System
Post-prestige, spend CPU Cores to recruit random heroes. Each hero permanently boosts specific buildings. Clicker Heroes-style — you never know who you'll get.
8 HEROES
♻
Prestige & Rebirth
Reset your run for CPU Cores — permanent multipliers that compound across every future run. Each prestige makes the next run exponentially faster.
INFINITE LOOPS
🎮
5 Minigames
Bug Catcher, SO Q&A, Git Blame, Rubber Duck Debug, and BSOD Typer. Each earns bonus bugs and breaks the idle loop with active play.
BONUS BUGS
🔊
Sound & Themes
Ambient sounds, SFX, and a full dark/light mode toggle. Tune the experience exactly how you like it — or mute everything and just watch numbers go up.
LIGHT · DARK MODE
📱
Mobile Ready
Fully responsive layout works on desktop, tablet, and mobile. Auto-saves to localStorage every 30 seconds so you never lose progress.
AUTO-SAVE
Heroes

Recruit. Boost. Repeat.

After your first prestige, CPU Cores can be spent to recruit a random hero from the roster. Each hero permanently multiplies specific buildings. Stack levels. Become unstoppable.

8 HEROES — RANDOM SELECTION
You see all heroes but the selection is random, weighted by rarity. Cost doubles with each recruit. Heroes persist through every future prestige.
Prestige

Reboot the System.
Keep the Power.

Accumulate 1 billion all-time bugs to unlock your first Prestige. Earn CPU Cores — each one grants a permanent +5% income multiplier. Stack indefinitely.

CPU CORES = PERMANENT POWER
Each prestige wipes buildings but keeps CPU Cores, heroes, achievements, and skins. The formula: √(allTimeBugs / 1B) cores per prestige.
